name: Baker
ability: You start knowing 3 characters, 1 and only 1 of which is in play.

name: Falconer
ability: Each dusk*, you may visit the Storyteller to learn how many townsfolk are alive. [+0 or +1 Outsiders]

name: Hangman
ability: On your 1st day, choose a player. If they are a good & they don't declare their character immediately, they die.

name: Bon Vivant
ability: Your alive neighbors (Not including travelers) are drunk

name: Voyeur
ability: Each night*, choose a player: if they died tonight, all players learn you are the Voyeur.

name: Hustler
ability: Each night*, you learn which character nominated you today. If you were mad that you were the hustler, you get false info.

name: Scavenger
ability: If both of your good neighbors die, something good happens to your team.

name: Genius
ability: Each night, choose a good character: you have that ability until you choose again. You are drunk every other night.

name: Weaver
ability: You start knowing a set of players. Each day, you may privately guess what it is.

name: Stableboy
ability: Each night, you learn 1 in-play character.

name: Nun
ability: Good Townsfolk can not be drunk, poisoned, or get false information.[+0 or +1 Outsider]

name: Scavenger
ability: If both of your good neighbors die, something good happens to your team.

name: Blacksmith
ability: You start knowing how many Outsiders are in play. All Outsiders are drunk even if you are dead. [-? to +? Outsiders]

name: Mole
ability: You are a Minion too. If the Demon publicly Guesses you (once), your team loses even if dead, drunk or poisoned.

name: Piper
ability: Once per game, publicly choose that from now on: Minions can privately choose to turn good, but the next executee's team loses.

name: Constable
ability: Each night, choose an evil character: you learn 1 or more characters that are not this character.

name: Beekeeper
ability: You choose which 3 good characters (not the Beekeeper) the Demon gets as bluffs.

name: Pirate
ability: You start knowing how many Pirates are in play. if Pirates are the only good character alive, good wins. [+0 to +2 Pirates]

name: Shaman
ability: Evil players think they are different evil characters. They learn what they are when the shaman dies.

name: Locksmith
ability: You think you are an Outsider, but you are not. The 1st time you are executed, something good happens. [+0 or +1 Outsider]

name: Palm Reader
ability: The Demon acts one night before it takes effect. Each night, you learn which player(s) the demon attacked.

name: Taxman
ability: Evil can't win. The 1st time evil would win, the Demon learns you are the Taxman tonight.

name: Machinist
ability: On your 1st day, visit the Storyteller to become a non-listed character, even if drunk or poisoned. [+0 to +2 Machinists]

name: Feathermaster
ability: You think you are a Townsfolk & have that ability. Good players who nominate you are drunk until dusk tomorrow.

name: Donkey Wrangler
ability: If you are nominated, the demon must be executed today, or your team loses. [Your token is a square]

name: Bully
ability: Any players who vote differently to you might die at any time.

name: Prisoner
ability: You may not vote. You know 1 not-in-play character. If most players choose to free you, become that character & alignment.

name: Tramp
ability: If there are any votes to execute you, you might be executed immediately

name: Golden Child
ability: The 1st player to nominate you, turns evil that night, even if you are dead. If it's you, your team loses.

name: Daredevil
ability: If you are not mad as an in-play Townsfolk, a Townsfolk might die, even if you are dead.

name: Haunt
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they learn this. if you have chosen all alive good players, evil wins. Good can't win.

name: Imposter
ability: You poison & gain the ability of the 1st in-play character that you are mad about being each day.

name: Puppeteer
ability: The Storyteller might do what you ask (within the rules), including answering questions and passing messages.

name: Racketeer
ability: If a successful vote is tied, one of the nominees (not the Demon) is executed immediately.

name: Amaniti
ability: Your neighbors register falsely to good players' abilities.

name: Amaniti
ability: Your neighbors register falsely to good players' abilities.

name: Vat Dweller
ability: All Outsiders are the same Outsider, you might choose which.[-? to +? Outsiders]

name: Copycat
ability: You are another in-play Minion too. If no other Minions are in play, choose which Minion you are.

name: Damned
ability: If all good players die, good wins. The Demon cannot kill the last living Damned.[+0 to +2 Damned]

name: Vampire
ability: You wake during Demon info instead of Minion info. You know which Minion is good.[+1 good minion who thinks they're evil]

name: Senator
ability: Players may only nominate their living neighbors, even if you are dead.

name: Queen of Lies
ability: Each night*, you may choose 3 players (all players learn who): each silently chooses a different alive player, 2 of whom die.

name: Hwisp
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If a Townsfolk nominates you, you die. Each day if 2 Townsfolk nominate, evil wins.

name: Tipi-Tipi
ability: Each night*, a player dies. On the final night, choose 2 players: the 1st is mad the 2nd is not the Demon or their team loses.

name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

id: Each night*, choose up to 3 players: they learn that they are marked. Or, choose that all marked players die.
name: Fanzazz
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & you become their alignment. If you die your team loses. If just 2 players live, your team wins.

name: Word of God
ability: Each dusk*, for each good player with a hand raised, choose a player: they die. If no one living raised a hand, evil wins.
